title: Rollbacks
excerpt: description: Revert to an older version of your Worker. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. You can roll back to a previously deployed [version](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/configuration/versions-and-deployments/#versions) of your Worker using [Wrangler](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/wrangler/commands/general/#rollback) or the Cloudflare dashboard.…
